description: Launch the SmartDesk Pro — a motorized standing desk. Configure it with two attributes: Size (Standard at $1,200 / Large at +$300) and Finish (Oak / White / Walnut, with Walnut +$200), producing 6 variants. Build a two-level BOM: each desk uses a Motorized Lift Frame sub-assembly (Linear Actuator ×2, Steel Frame ×1, Control Unit ×1, Cable Harness ×1), a finish-specific Desktop Surface assigned via variant-conditional BOM lines (Oak Board for Oak, White Laminate for White, Walnut Board for Walnut), and a universal Hardware Kit. Create wholesale pricelist 'Authorized Dealer Network': 1–4 units at list price, 5–9 units at 15% off, 10+ at 25% off. Validate the BOM by manufacturing 1 unit of Standard/Walnut — confirm it consumes Motorized Lift Frame, Walnut Board, and Hardware Kit (not Oak Board or White Laminate). Then create and confirm a sales order for Cascade Furniture Partners: 8× SmartDesk Pro Standard/Walnut at dealer pricing. Verify the order total matches the expected amount calculated in the product launch guide on the Desktop.
